# AcademicForge

- Status: linked-only
- Author: Hugh Yau
- Repository: https://github.com/HughYau/AcademicForge
- Version checked: `410d5b29ab28a96cbb5915114df872b2cbe7d2d3`
- License: MIT for the forge repository; included submodules can retain their own licenses

## Why It Is Useful

This external resource collects academic writing and research workflows.

## Use In This Repository

No text, prompts, examples, code, or files from the external repository are
copied or adapted here. It is linked for future review because relevant skills
overlap with existing imports and individual submodule licenses should be
checked separately before copying.
